CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3.name: CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3
CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3.brief: creates the kinetic partition of the bounding box of the polygons given as input data.
CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3.detailed: The kinetic partition can either be initialized by using the default constructor Kinetic_space_partition_3() , insert() to provide input data and initialize() to prepare the partition or by using the constructor with input parameters. GeomTraits must be a model of KineticSpacePartitionTraits_3 . IntersectionTraits must be a model of Kernel using exact computations. Defaults to CGAL::Exact_predicates_exact_constructions_kernel .

members.name: Kinetic_space_partition_3
members.brief: constructs an empty kinetic space partition object.
members.detailed: Use insert() afterwards to insert polygons into the partition and initialize() to initialize the partition. NamedParameters a sequence of Named Parameters np a sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below Optional Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> verbose </button> Write timing and internal information to std::cout . Type: bool Default: false <button class="collapsible"> debug </button> Export of intermediate results. Type: bool Default: false

members.name: Kinetic_space_partition_3
members.brief: constructs a kinetic space partition object and initializes it.
members.detailed: PointRange must be a model of ConstRange whose iterator type is RandomAccessIterator and whose value type is Point_3. PolygonRange contains index ranges to form polygons by providing indices into PointRange NamedParameters a sequence of Named Parameters points an instance of PointRange with 3D points and corresponding 3D normal vectors polygons a range of non-coplanar polygons defined by a range of indices into points np a sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below Optional Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> point_map </button> a property map associating points to the elements of the input range PointRange points . Type: a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the iterator of PointRange and whose value type is GeomTraits::Point_3 Default: CGAL::Identity_property_map<GeomTraits::Point_3> <button class="collapsible"> debug </button> Export of intermediate results. Type: bool Default: false <button class="collapsible"> verbose </button> Write timing and internal information to std::cout. Type: bool Default: false <button class="collapsible"> reorient_bbox </button> Use the oriented bounding box instead of the axis-aligned bounding box. While the z direction is maintained, the x axis is aligned with the largest variation in the horizontal plane. Type: bool Default: false <button class="collapsible"> bbox_dilation_ratio </button> Factor for extension of the bounding box of the input data to be used for the partition. Type: FT Default: 1.1 <button class="collapsible"> max_octree_depth </button> The maximal depth of the octree for subdividing the kinetic partition before initialization. Type: std::size_t Default: 3 <button class="collapsible"> max_octree_node_size </button> A node in the octree is only split if the contained number of primitives is larger and the maximal depth is not yet reached. Type: std::size_t Default: 40 ! points.empty() and ! polygons.empty()

members.name: insert
members.brief: inserts non-coplanar polygons, requires initialize() afterwards to have effect.
members.detailed: PointRange must be a model of ConstRange whose iterator type is RandomAccessIterator and whose value type is GeomTraits::Point_3 . PolygonRange contains index ranges to form polygons by providing indices into PointRange NamedParameters a sequence of Named Parameters points an instance of PointRange with 3D points polygons a range of non-coplanar polygons defined by a range of indices into points np a sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below Optional Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> point_map </button> a property map associating points to the elements of the points Type: a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the iterator of PointRange and whose value type is GeomTraits::Point_3 Default: CGAL::Identity_property_map<GeomTraits::Point_3>

members.name: initialize
members.brief: initializes the kinetic partition of the bounding box.
members.detailed: NamedParameters a sequence of Named Parameters np a sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below Optional Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> reorient_bbox </button> Use the oriented bounding box instead of the axis-aligned bounding box. While the z direction is maintained, the x axis is aligned with the largest variation in the horizontal plane. Type: bool Default: false <button class="collapsible"> bbox_dilation_ratio </button> Factor for extension of the bounding box of the input data to be used for the partition. Type: FT Default: 1.1 <button class="collapsible"> max_octree_depth </button> The maximal depth of the octree for subdividing the kinetic partition before initialization. Type: std::size_t Default: 3 <button class="collapsible"> max_octree_node_size </button> A node in the octree is only split if the contained number of primitives is larger and the maximal depth is not yet reached. Type: std::size_t Default: 40 input data has been provided via insert() .

members.name: partition
members.brief: propagates the kinetic polygons in the initialized partition.
members.detailed: k maximum number of allowed intersections for each input polygon before its expansion stops. initialized partition and k != 0

members.name: number_of_volumes
members.brief: returns the number of volumes created by the kinetic partition.

members.name: input_planes
members.brief: provides the support planes of the partition derived from the input polygons

members.name: get_linear_cell_complex
members.brief: exports the kinetic partition into a Linear_cell_complex_for_combinatorial_map<3, 3> using a model of KineticLCCItems as items, e.g., Kinetic_space_partition_3::Linear_cell_complex_min_items .
members.detailed: Volume and face attributes defined in the model KineticLCCItems are filled. The volume index is in the range [0, number of volumes -1] LCC must be a model of Linear_cell_complex_for_combinatorial_map<3, 3> using a model of KineticLCCItems . lcc instance of LCC to be filled with the kinetic partition. Any data contained in lcc will be cleared before. created partition

members.name: Face_support
members.brief: identifies the support of a face in the exported linear cell complex, which is either an input polygon, identified by a non-negative number, a side of the bounding box in the rotated coordinate system or a face of the octree used to partition the scene.

members.brief: Face indices of the volume.
members.detailed: OutputIterator output iterator accepting Index volume_index index of the query volume. it output iterator where faces of the volume are put created partition

members.name: neighbors
members.brief: Indices of adjacent volumes.
members.detailed: Negative indices correspond to the empty spaces behind the sides of the bounding box. face_index index of the query face. pair of adjacent volumes. -1 zmin -2 ymin -3 xmax -4 ymax -5 xmin -6 zmax created partition

CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3::Linear_.name: CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3::Linear_cell_complex_min_items
CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3::Linear_.brief: this class provides a minimal model of KineticLCCItems .
CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3::Linear_.detailed: It adds attributes to faces and volumes and defines the use of index-based LinearCellComplex .

KineticLCCFaceAttribute.name: KineticLCCFaceAttribute
KineticLCCFaceAttribute.brief: The concept KineticLCCFaceAttribute refines CellAttribute to store additional information for each face related to its associated input polygon.

members.name: Plane_3
members.brief: 3D plane type compatible with Kinetic_space_partition_3::Intersection_kernel

members.name: input_polygon_index
members.brief: Stores the index of the input polygon the provided that support plane of this face. Negative numbers correspond to the values defined in the enum Kinetic_space_partition_3::Face_support .

members.name: plane
members.brief: Support plane of the face derived from the corresponding input polygon or from octree nodes used for subdivision.

members.name: part_of_initial_polygon
members.brief: Does this face overlap with the corresponding input polygon.

KineticLCCItems.name: KineticLCCItems
KineticLCCItems.brief: The concept KineticLCCItems refines the concept of LinearCellComplexItems by adding 2-attributes and 3-attributes to store information from the kinetic partition.
KineticLCCItems.detailed: The first type in Attributes tuple must be a model of the CellAttributeWithPoint concept. The third type in Attributes tuple must be a model of the KineticLCCFaceAttribute concept. The fourth type in Attributes tuple must be a model of the KineticLCCVolumeAttribute concept. Has models CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3::Linear_cell_complex_min_items CGAL::Kinetic_space_partition_3 KineticLCCFaceAttribute KineticLCCVolumeAttribute LinearCellComplexItems

members.name: Use_index
members.brief: Using the index-based version of the LinearCellComplex concept.

KineticLCCVolumeAttribute.name: KineticLCCVolumeAttribute
KineticLCCVolumeAttribute.brief: The concept KineticLCCVolumeAttribute refines CellAttribute to store the barycenter and an id.

members.name: Tetrahedron_3
members.brief: The 3d tetrahedron type.

members.name: Transform_3
members.brief: The 3d transformation type.

members.name: FT
members.brief: The number type of the Cartesian coordinates.

members.name: Construct_point_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides Point_3 operator()(Origin p) returning the point with 0, 0, 0 as Cartesian coordinates and Point_3 operator()(FT x, FT y, FT z) returning the point with x , y and z as Cartesian coordinates.

members.name: Construct_vector_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides Vector_3 operator()(Point_3 p1, Point_3 p2) and Vector_3 operator()(Origin p1, Point_3 p2) returning the vector p1p2 , Vector_3 operator()(NULL_VECTOR) returning the null vector, and Vector_3 operator()(Line_3 l) returning a vector having the same direction as l .

members.name: Construct_line_2
members.brief: Function object type that provides Line_2 operator()(Point_2 p, Vector_2 d) returning the line going through p in the direction of d .

members.name: Construct_point_on_2
members.brief: Function object type that provides Point_2 operator()(Line_2 l, int i) returning an arbitrary point on l .
members.detailed: i is not used and can be of any value.

members.name: Construct_point_2
members.brief: Function object type that provides Point_2 operator()(FT x, FT y) returning the 2D point with x and y as Cartesian coordinates.

members.name: Construct_vector_2
members.brief: Function object type that provides Vector_2 operator()(Point_2 p1, Point_2 p2) returning the vector p1p2 , Vector_2 operator()(NULL_VECTOR) returning the null vector.

members.name: ConstructTetrahedron_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides Tetrahedron_3 operator(Point_3 p, Point_3 q, Point_3 r, Point_3 s) returning the tetrahedron with the points p , q , r and s .

members.name: Compute_x_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides FT operator()(Point_3 p) and FT operator()(Vector_3 v) returning the x coordinate of a point and a vector respectively.

members.name: Compute_y_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides FT operator()(Point_3 p) and FT operator()(Vector_3 v) returning the y coordinate of a point and a vector respectively.

members.name: Compute_z_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides FT operator()(Point_3 p) and FT operator()(Vector_3 v) returning the z coordinate of a point and a vector respectively.

members.name: Compute_x_2
members.brief: Function object type that provides FT operator()(Point_2 p) and FT operator()(Vector_2 v) returning the x coordinate of a point and a vector respectively.

members.name: Compute_y_2
members.brief: Function object type that provides FT operator()(Point_2 p) and FT operator()(Vector_2 v) returning the y coordinate of a point and a vector respectively.

members.name: Compute_squared_length_2
members.brief: Function object type that provides FT operator()(Vector_2 v) returning the squared length of v .

members.name: Compute_scalar_product_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides FT operator()(Vector_3 v1, Vector_3 v2) returning the scalar product of v1 and v2 .

members.name: Construct_sum_of_vectors_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides Vector_3 operator() ( Vector_3 v1, Vector_3 v2) returning the v1+v2 .

members.name: Construct_orthogonal_vector_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides Vector_3 operator()(Plane_3 p) returns a vector that is orthogonal to the plane p and directed to the positive side of p .

members.name: Construct_plane_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides Plane_3 operator()(Point_3 p, Point_3 q, Point_3 r) creates a plane passing through the points p , q and r and Plane_3 operator()(Point_3 p, Vector_3 v) introduces a plane that passes through point p and that is orthogonal to V .

members.name: Construct_projected_point_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides Vector_3 operator()(Plane_3 h, Point_3 p) returns the orthogonal projection of p onto h .

members.name: Collinear_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides bool operator()(Point_3 p, Point_3 q, Point_3 r) returning true if the points p , q , and r are collinear and false otherwise.

members.name: Oriented_side_3
members.brief: Function object type that provides Oriented_size operator()(Plane_3 h, Point_3 p) returns CGAL::ON_ORIENTED_BOUNDARY , CGAL::ON_NEGATIVE_SIDE , or CGAL::ON_POSITIVE_SIDE , depending on the position of p relative to the oriented plane h .
